use_cases: Displaying incident metrics and trends in DevOps monitoring dashboards
Showing uptime and incident history for SaaS status pages
Tracking critical vs total incidents over selectable time ranges
Providing visual incident reports for SRE/on-call teams
ai_summary: A composite incident report card component featuring an interactive area chart, time range selector, and metric summaries with dark/light mode support. Uses reaviz for charting and framer-motion for animations. Designed for monitoring dashboards, status pages, and DevOps tooling where incident tracking and reporting are essential.
